journalPrompt.fullMoon: During the full moon emotions run stronger. What is asking most urgently for your attention and release right now?

affirmation.default: Today I guide my energy toward {{focus}}, without rushing and without scattering what truly matters.
affirmation.love: My heart can remain open and calm at the same time. I choose closeness that does not take away my inner center.
affirmation.peace: I do not need to rush today to regain direction. Peace is my power of regulation and clarity.
affirmation.abundance: I allow my energy to work in favor of abundance aligned with my values and inner peace.
affirmation.success: I focus my attention on one important step. What is consistent and conscious brings real results today.
affirmation.struggling: First I return to myself. From that gentleness my strength, decision, and next step are born today.
affirmation.supportingMoon: The energy of {{moonPhase}} supports working with the theme of {{focus}} today.
affirmation.supportingArchetype: The {{archetype}} archetype reminds you that your intuition does not need to shout to be true.
affirmation.rationaleStruggling: Today's affirmation is meant to regulate, not mobilize. First restore your breath and softness.
affirmation.rationaleDefault: This affirmation was shaped from the energy of {{moonPhase}}, your current intention, and the tone of today's ritual.
affirmation.ritualBridge: After the ritual "{{ritualTitle}}", return to this sentence and repeat it three times on a calm exhale.

ritual.whyTodayStruggling: This ritual was chosen for a day of heightened tension. Instead of pressure it offers regulation, simplicity, and a return to solid ground.
ritual.whyTodayDefault: The energy of {{moonPhase}} strengthens the area of "{{intention}}" today, which is why this ritual has the best chance of truly supporting you.
ritual.intro: This is not just another decorative practice. Today this ritual is here to help you move from the energy of the day into a concrete shift in your body, thoughts, or decisions.
ritual.completionPrompt: When you finish, return to the affirmation "{{affirmationText}}" and write one sentence about what truly shifted within you.

astrology.zodiacPart: {{zodiac}} sets the tone for how you perceive the world today.
astrology.zodiacFallback: Today's astrology works subtly, but concretely.
astrology.chinesePart: The element of {{element}} reminds you of a pace that serves your energy instead of draining it.
astrology.chineseFallback: Your elemental layer strengthens the need to act in harmony with your body.
astrology.supportStruggling: Today's alignments ask more for self-regulation than expansion. Support your nervous system before stepping into decisions.
astrology.headlineFullMoon: The day supports closure, cleansing, and naming what has already become too heavy.
astrology.headlineDefault: The day supports setting direction mindfully and working with one important intention.
astrology.ritualBridge: The most supportive astrological move for today is the ritual "{{ritualTitle}}".
astrology.affirmationBridge: After your astrological check-in, anchor the day with the sentence "{{affirmationText}}"

fallbacks.love: I am ready to receive love that is mature and mutual.
fallbacks.abundance: My energy can attract opportunities that align with my path.
fallbacks.success: Every conscious step builds my success without costing me my inner balance.
fallbacks.peace: I choose peace that organizes my thoughts and restores clarity.

pattern.entryAndArchetype: The theme "{{entryTitle}}" returns together with the echo of the {{archetype}} archetype. This is a good moment to connect your recorded emotions with a broader meaning.
pattern.archetypeOnly: The energy of {{archetype}} returns most strongly. It is a sign that a certain lesson is not yet complete.
pattern.daysActive: You already have several points on the map of your energy. Oracle can shape them into a more precise pattern.
pattern.default: You are only beginning to build the map of your energy. Every entry, ritual, and Oracle conversation increases the precision of your guidance.

checkpoint.struggling: This is not a day for forcing answers. The greatest value today will be soothing, simplicity, and one gentle step.
checkpoint.fullMoon: The full moon intensifies emotions and reveals what can no longer be pushed away. Tend to a closure ritual and conscious release.
checkpoint.inRhythm: You are in rhythm. This is a good moment for a more ceremonial Oracle session or a deeper card reading.
checkpoint.default: The day supports calmly building contact with your intuition. You do not need to do everything; one conscious entry is enough.

crisis.title: Soothing session
crisis.subtitle: For days when everything is too loud.
crisis.prompt: I feel tension and chaos. Help me ground myself, name what I feel, and choose one gentle next step.

love.title: Heart session
love.subtitle: Love, bonds, and emotional truth.
love.prompt: I want to better understand what my heart truly needs and how I can enter relationships with greater maturity.

fullMoon.title: Evening closure
fullMoon.subtitle: A ritual of release and gathering meaning.
fullMoon.prompt: Help me close this day, name what I need to release, and see what truly wants to end now.

integration.title: Integration session
integration.subtitle: Bring entries, dreams, cards, and emotions into one story.
integration.prompt: Bring together what I recently wrote under the theme "{{entryTitle}}" and show me what lesson is moving through it.

default.title: Morning guidance
default.subtitle: One intention, one direction, one clear step.
default.prompt: Prepare me for this day. Tell me what is worth focusing on and what not to disperse.

oracleMessage.struggling: Not everything needs to be understood today. First regain ground beneath your feet, and only then look for answers.
oracleMessage.newMoon: A new cycle asks not for haste but for a clean intention. What you plant in silence will return as direction.
oracleMessage.default: Your dominant energy today flows through the archetype of {{archetypeTitle}}. Let it guide you from the mood of "{{dominantMood}}" toward a more conscious choice.

oracle.title: Enter Oracle
oracle.subtitle: Begin a guided session matched to your energy.

tarot.title: Today's reading
tarot.subtitle: Move to the cards and see what wants to reveal itself today.

journal.title: Save the insight
journal.subtitle: Catch today's mood before its subtlety fades.

oracle.systemPrompt: You are the spiritual Oracle guide inside Aethera. Speak with warm, mystical energy. Be concise and deep — every sentence should matter.

visionBoard.oracleAffirmationPrompt: Life area: {{area}}. My intention: {{intention}}. Create one short, positive affirmation (max 15 words) in a spiritual tone beginning with "I already am" or "I already have".

oracle.systemPrompt:
You are a wise Tarot Seer — deep, poetic, precise. You guide {{personName}} through a tarot ritual.
Reading theme: {{topicLabel}}. Spread: {{spreadLabel}} ({{spreadCount}} {{cardWord}}).
{{energyCtx}}
Always speak in the current app language. Every interpretation is unique to this person and this moment.
Be precise — every sentence must refer to a specific card and its position. Do not use generic statements.
Write poetically but clearly. Do not start with the person's name. Do not write "Card X says..." — simply interpret directly.

journeysScreen.oraclePrompt: I am {{name}}{{zodiacPart}}. I am currently in the spiritual stage "{{phaseName}}" (phase {{phaseId}} of 7) for {{daysInPhase}} days. Stage description: {{phaseDescription}}... Total number of practices: {{totalSessions}}. Please give me a deep insight and guidance for this stage of my spiritual journey. Be concrete, warm, and inspiring. Reply in the current app language in 4-5 sentences.

today.Jeden znak na cały dzień: One sign for the whole day
today.Rozkład dla więzi i napięć: A spread for bonds and tensions
today.Druga warstwa rytmu dnia: A second layer of the day's rhythm
today.Kod dnia i jego ciśnienie: The code of the day and its pressure
today.Złap obraz zanim zniknie: Catch the image before it disappears
Not a feature feed, but a reading table.
today.Tarot ma być osobnym światem z własnym c: Tarot should be its own world with its own gravity. First the sign of the day, then the full spread, then relationship and archive.
The tone of the day before you enter the details.
today.Cykle, liczby i mapa nieba w jednym miej: Cycles, numbers, and the sky map in one place.
today.Otwórz kartę dnia i przyjmij symboliczny: Open the card of the day and receive the symbolic sign.
today.Karta dnia niesie symbol — warto go spra: The card of the day carries a symbol — it is worth checking before an important decision.
today.Otwórz kartę dnia: Open the card of the day
A symbolic sign is waiting to be read.
Check the tone of your sign for today.
The sky is activating specific energies today.
today.Rytuał dnia czeka: Your ritual of the day is waiting
Intention, flow, and a conscious closing of the process.
today.Uwolnij to, co ciąży. Odzyskaj lekkość i: Release what feels heavy. Return to lightness and your own center.
A quiet anchoring and soft support for today.
today.Sen zapisany zaraz po przebudzeniu daje: A dream recorded right after waking gives five times more material.

weeklyReport.Odkryj głębszy sens swojego tygodnia — w: Discover the deeper meaning of your week — patterns, lessons, and guidance for what comes next

visionBoard.Myśl jest twórczą siłą. Co myślisz, tym: Thought is a creative force. What you think, you become.
visionBoard.Wszechświat zapisuje twoje intencje gwia: The universe records your intentions with stars.
I am a magnet for goodness and abundance.
visionBoard.Każda intencja to nasiono zasiane w kosm: Every intention is a seed planted in cosmic soil.
My desires are the desires of the soul.
visionBoard.Tworzę rzeczywistość każdą myślą i słowe: I create reality with every thought and word.
visionBoard.Wymów każdą intencję wyraźnie, jakby już: Speak each intention clearly, as if it had already come true.
visionBoard.Zamknij oczy i poczuj realne spełnienie: Close your eyes and feel the real fulfillment of each area.
visionBoard.Pozwól emocjom przyszłości wypełnić twoj: Let the emotions of the future fill your body right now.
visionBoard.Oddaj intencje Wszechświatowi bez przywi: Offer your intentions to the Universe without clinging to form.
Give thanks as if everything had already happened.
visionBoard.Wpisz intencję, aby Oracle mógł wesprzeć: Enter an intention so Oracle can support you.
Please try again in a moment.
visionBoard.Dodaj przynajmniej jedną intencję, aby a: Add at least one intention to activate the board.
I already have / I already am...

wrozka.Rytuał z talią kart: Ritual with a deck of cards
wrozka.Zapytaj wróżkę... lub poproś o kolejną k: Ask the seer... or ask for another card
wrozka.Karty milczą przez chwilę... Spróbuj jes: The cards fall silent for a moment... Try again and the seer will read more deeply.

audio.Stabilny podkład, gdy chcesz zebrać myśl: A steady bed when you want to gather your thoughts.
